steps.title: Set up
steps.content: The question asks for $\left(4\right)(x-5)$ directly. From $68 = 8 + 4(x-5)$, isolate the target expression by subtracting $8$ from both sides.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above is $60$, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore C is correct.
